purpose: Assign a workpaper index (e.g. '0102') to a single object after it has been moved to its destination folder.
gotchas: USE PUT, NOT POST. Live UI captures show POST but POST returns 200 and is a silent no-op (index does not persist). PUT is the working method. Discovered empirically.
Move PRESERVES the index; locationId stays stable. Set-Index after Move only for genuinely new (null-index) forms — NOT to restore a cleared index (Move does not clear it).
script_function: scripts.wpm.set_index(client_id, items, headers)  # serializes a list sequentially
